description: Same as mol-full-team with a plan-check step prepended and a plan-update step appended. Plan-checker verifies the plan is concrete enough to execute and writes a refined sidecar if needed. At integration, the orchestrator ticks checkboxes in the plan file for work that got done. Use when your plan is long, multi-milestone, or still rough.

feature.description: What is being built — be specific enough for the explorer to decompose

plan.description: Path to a plan file (required for this formula — it's the whole point). Should contain milestones, ideally as - [ ] checkboxes. Plan-checker will refine it to a .refined.md sidecar if gaps are found.

lint_cmd_default.description: Default lint command. /spawn sets this from the detected stack profile. Leave empty to have explorer pick per arm.

base_branch.description: The branch to merge integration/{team} back into after all work is done (e.g. main, develop, feature/xyz)

implementer_model.description: Model for implementer arms. Default sonnet. For ~3x savings, set to gpt-4o-mini (requires Codex CLI).

use_refined_plan.description: If plan-checker produces a .refined.md sidecar, use that instead of the original (true) or stop for user approval first (false). Default false — safer.

steps.title: [{{team}}] plan-check: verify {{plan}} is ready to execute
steps.description: Read the plan at {{plan}}. Check for concrete problem statement, verifiable milestones (prefer - [ ] checkboxes), specific file paths and signatures, missing pieces (error handling, tests, auth), and stack fit. Produce PLAN_VERDICT: PASS / REFINED / NEEDS_REVISION. On REFINED, write {{plan}}.refined.md. On NEEDS_REVISION, stop the run and return to user.

steps.title: [{{team}}] explore + decompose: {{feature}}
steps.description: Map the codebase for {{feature}} using the verified plan at {{plan}} (or {{plan}}.refined.md if plan-checker produced one and use_refined_plan is true). Decompose into implementer arms with non-overlapping file boundaries. Bond one mol-implement-arm per arm. Set cross-arm dependencies in beads. Report decomposition. Model: haiku.

steps.title: [{{team}}] judge: verify all implementations
steps.description: Judge all implementer arms (attempt 1 of 3). VERDICT: PASS unblocks test + review. VERDICT: FAIL → reopen failed arm(s), retry. Max 3 attempts. If a FAIL is rooted in plan ambiguity (not implementer error), flag it so the orchestrator can re-run plan-check. Model: sonnet.

steps.title: [{{team}}] test-writer: write tests for {{feature}}
steps.description: Write colocated tests for all new source files across all arms. Run the repo's test command and confirm tests pass. Model: haiku.

steps.title: [{{team}}] code-review: integration/{{team}} branch
steps.description: Run code review on integration/{{team}} branch. Report P1/P2 findings. Model: sonnet.

steps.title: [{{team}}] codex-review: correctness + spec-adherence pass on integration/{{team}}
steps.description: Run Codex CLI against the changed files for mechanical correctness (wrong fields, missing null checks, off-by-one). Report P1/P2. Do NOT edit files. Skip gracefully if codex is not installed.

steps.title: [{{team}}] integrate: merge arms, merge to base branch, tick plan, clean up
steps.description: 1. Create integration/{{team}}, merge all arm + test-writer branches into it. 2. Fix P1 findings from both reviewers. 3. Update the plan: for every milestone in {{plan}} (or the refined version) that got shipped by this team, tick its - [ ] checkbox to - [x]. Append a '## Progress log' entry with team name, date, arms, and linked commits. 4. Push integration/{{team}} to origin. 5. Merge into base branch, push. 6. Delete branches + worktrees. 7. Close remaining open beads issues.
